overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through rainy Night City streets with heavy traffic, neon billboards, and modern architecture. The vehicle maneuvers through multiple intersections and turns while rain creates reflective wet road surfaces and neon lights reflect off the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial avenue with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: cruising straight down wet avenue following traffic flow, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in same lane, brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful cyberpunk advertisements on building facade
line of palm trees along sidewalk edge, partially obscured by rain and fog
modern reflective glass skyscraper with geometric facade patterns

segments.scene_description: Driving straight along a wide, rain-soaked commercial avenue lined with palm trees and towering glass buildings. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while traffic moves steadily ahead through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow zebra crossings

events.description: approaching intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, slowing to navigate turn
executing right turn at intersection, steering into narrower street

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate right turn at intersection, following the curve of the road

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes painted on wet asphalt
white grid pattern painted on road surface indicating no-parking zone at intersection
distinctive teal-colored building facade with large windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Navigating a wide intersection marked with yellow zebra crossings and white grid patterns. The vehicle executes a right turn, leaving the palm-lined avenue behind and entering a narrower commercial street with a distinctive teal building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with close building facades

events.description: entering narrower street with close building facades and reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: proceeding straight down narrower commercial corridor, passing storefronts and neon signs

entered.detail: glowing cyan and pink neon signage attached to building facades advertising businesses
metal railings separating pedestrian walkway from street level

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrower commercial corridor with the teal building now prominent on the right. Neon signs glow through the rain, and the street feels more enclosed with buildings close on both sides.

events.description: initiating left turn maneuver at intersection
passing white police cruiser parked on left side of street

agents.ego_description: executing left turn at intersection while observing police vehicle parked at curb

notable_agents.action: white police cruiser parked at curb with emergency lights visible, stationary

entered.detail: white police vehicle with blue emergency lights parked along the curb
thick yellow pedestrian crossing lines marking the intersection

segments.scene_description: Making a left turn at an intersection marked with yellow crosswalk lines. A white police cruiser is parked prominently on the left side of the street as the vehicle completes the turn onto a wider avenue.

events.description: driving under concrete highway overpass, entering semi-covered area
approaching intersection with cross traffic visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating along wide avenue, passing under overpass structure and approaching distant intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the road creating partial cover
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
tall digital advertising screens mounted on building sides displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wide avenue beneath a massive concrete highway overpass supported by thick pillars. Large vertical billboards line the left side while the road stretches ahead toward distant intersections, with rain continuing to fall steadily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-drenched urban landscape that shifts from a wide, palm-lined boulevard to a dense commercial corridor and finally beneath a massive concrete overpass. It begins by cruising straight along a broad commercial avenue where towering glass buildings and digital billboards reflect off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle navigates a wide intersection marked with yellow zebra crossings, it executes a right turn that transitions the scene from the open avenue into a narrower, more enclosed street dominated by a prominent teal building and glowing neon signs. The camera then makes a left turn past a parked white police cruiser, moving away from the tight corridor and back onto a wider thoroughfare. Finally, the view expands as the vehicle drives beneath a heavy concrete highway overpass supported by thick pillars, with large vertical billboards lining the road as it stretches toward the distant city.
